document_kind_reasons: declares the standard under review and answers 15 criteria
outdated_note: The vendor report date (May 2025) is approximately 14 months old. VPATs older than 12 months may not reflect the current accessibility state of the product. SFBRN recommends requesting an updated VPAT before final procurement decisions.

score_detail.message: Strong accessibility support. The submitted VPAT indicates broad WCAG Level AA support, with few or no identified Level AA barriers.
